textByHashes.7c485db75994a7ced50b4a91983c9d76ed62b9df: Hehe! We see you're in a pickle!
textByHashes.5ea08b00b410a03e3850a9ccbdd8025ac47c2c3c: Wants to be getting over the nasty lava do we?
textByHashes.2a83cc55759af25fac5360e60437e5eeb649001b: Hehe! Ye'll come back! They always come back!
textByHashes.bffdaad46a77a1d8f14911573feeba6f3b007452: Mocking us are we? Clever one aren't we?
textByHashes.cf1607ea3011604b60199f19dd9c8e92987da07c: I'm knowing some magic trickesses! I could get over easy as that!
textByHashes.a22b885002636d7555b722c30fed86900fc6a696: Don't tell them! They always come! They pester poor Winelda!
textByHashes.53f5eb77ca1effcecb9d0b08d16c18e7f1cc3a83: Get Winelda 20 limpwurt roots for my pot.
textByHashes.9889fd512f542f5b0ef0b5a832f404457cc318f8: Then we shows them some magic!
textByHashes.d6b5ed40db6c4c8393b8f9443f5821d4b355d006: Have you got roots for poor Winelda?
textByHashes.ff1ebe4b761fc6dceb63a5a22caa45d58e09883e: We needs 20 Limpwurt roots for pot.
textByHashes.827bae795e433b74ace2ece0d785bd6fb892584c: Good! Good! My potion is nearly ready! Bubble, bubble, toil and trouble!
textByHashes.9d2d8f27cc7a819b8822c472eda3e1a36b43d2d4: Now we shows them ours magic! Hold on tight!
textByHashes.16dbec17d8f2c56b487957e93c84a94203bb3ba5: Certainly! We helps those that helps poor Winelda!
